steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage shifts from describing the streamlined A320 to introducing a boxy semitruck—two opposites. The blank needs a transition word that marks a direct contrast between them.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'Specifically': signals elaboration, not contrast. ✗
  • Choice B — 'On the other hand': marks exactly this kind of opposition—here is one side, now look at the other. ✓
  • Choice C — 'As a result': signals causation, not contrast. ✗
  • Choice D — 'In conclusion': signals a closing summary, not a contrast. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
